## What is the error?
<!-- Describe the mistake clearly. What is wrong? -->


## Where is it?
<!-- Tell us exactly where to find it -->

- **File name:** <!-- e.g. Term-1/Week-02/lesson.md -->
- **Section or heading:** <!-- e.g. "Learning Objectives" or "Exercise 3" -->
- **Line or paragraph:** <!-- e.g. "Third paragraph" or "Line 24" -->

## What does it currently say?
<!-- Copy and paste the incorrect text here -->

```
paste incorrect text here
```

## What should it say instead?
<!-- Write the correct version here -->

```
paste correct version here
```

## How serious is this?
<!-- Put an X in the box that applies -->

- [ ] 🔴 Critical — wrong information that could confuse students
- [ ] 🟡 Moderate — unclear or misleading content
- [ ] 🟢 Minor — typo or formatting issue

## Anything else?
<!-- Optional: screenshots, links, or extra context -->
